headline: Trimble Glacier Mapping Highlights Growing Role In Climate And Geospatial Work
summary: Trimble's GNSS positioning technology supported the Project Pressure Melting Topics expedition in Papua, Indonesia. The project mapped rapidly receding tropical glaciers with centimeter level accuracy in challenging terrain. The work enabled detailed 3D modeling of glacier retreat to aid climate research and local resource planning. For investors watching NasdaqGS:TRMB, this project illustrates how the company’s core strengths in positioning, modeling, and geospatial data extend into high...
